# EZPos-System Installer Download Website

This is a modern, responsive website for distributing the EZPos-System POS installer.

## Project Overview
- Static HTML/CSS/JavaScript website
- Responsive design for all devices
- Clean, modern UI with download functionality
- Single-page application

## Development Guidelines
- Keep the design clean and minimal
- Ensure mobile responsiveness
- Use vanilla JavaScript (no frameworks)
- Optimize for fast loading

## Build & Run
```bash
# For development, serve the files using any HTTP server
# VS Code extension: Live Server
# Or use: npx http-server
```
